text: "That’s quite a jab for such a tiny lad!
subject: Kobold Spearman

text: "You think I’m afraid of a wriggly bug?
subject: Giant Centipede

text: "A giant blow, but I'll not bend low!
subject: Boss: Hill Giant

text: "A gaze so cold, but I'll still be bold!
subject: Basilisk

text: "Well, darling, at least my hair won't need a style tonight!
subject: Medusa
